data.text: M03/10 FELISIAN, WITH A SLIGHT GREEN GLOW ON THE CLODTOPS OF THIS
MOSTLY WATER WORLD. LANDING AT 0.60 WAS ON A HEAVILY FORESTED
HILLSIDE WHERE A BIRD WAS SPOTTEED. AT 99.4 IT WAS COLD ROLLING
BARREN GROUND. IF IT WASN'T FOR A COUPLE OF ICE POOLS, I MIGHT HAVE
THOUGHT IT WAS A THIN ATMO WORLD. 130.84 AND 144.60 WAS THE MOUNTAIN
ROUGH AREAS I FOUND TOO OFTEN ON FELISIAN WORLDS IN THIS SYSTEM. PRO
